project.name: Ivy County
project.description: Ultra-luxury 3 & 4 BHK by County Group in Sector 75. Cascading vertical gardens, five-star amenities, Tier-1 delivery record.
project.long_description: Ivy County by County Group is the flagship luxury asset in Central Noida. Launched September 2019, delivered June 2024. 546 units across 5 towers (G+26–G+27). Signature cascading vertical gardens, zero-delay delivery record, clean CC/OC, active registries. County Group has delivered 6 projects with zero structural delays.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Ivy County is the premier luxury wealth-preservation asset in Central Noida because it delivers uncompromising construction quality, flawless legal compliance, and an exclusive, low-density community.
why_buy: Impeccable Delivery Pedigree: Builder consistently delivers exactly what is rendered — zero compromise on material quality or finish.
Absolute Title Security: 100% physically complete and legally clear — immediate, stress-free registry execution.
Exclusive Low-Density: Limited towers ensure premium privacy and uncrowded amenities unlike neighboring mega-townships.
why_avoid: Capped Profit Potential: Extremely high entry price leaves very little room for future capital growth or quick flipping.
Heavy Upkeep Costs: Sustaining signature vertical gardens results in massive monthly maintenance bills.
Car Dependent: Project is tucked inside the sector — not a quick walk to metro or main road retail.
decision_profile.best_for: Wealthy end-users, HNI families, NRIs seeking zero legal stress and immediate luxury living.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Cash-flow investors, short-term flippers, or buyers with budgets under ₹2.5 Cr.
decision_profile.recommendation_notes: Internal notes about this project's recommendation…
decision_profile.advisor_notes: Absolute best property for a wealthy family wanting zero daily stress. Some sellers ask for cash above registry value — advise buyer to not cross safe limits.

persona_profile.work_location: Sector 62/63 IT Hub or Sector 125–142 Corporate Hub
persona_profile.motivation_note: Status symbol and premium lifestyle; not a yield play.

reasons: Status Symbol: The most prestigious address in Central Noida — county group never compromises on finish.
Wealth Preservation: Capital values stable, minimal risk of price erosion.
Zero Hassle Living: Move in immediately with full legal clarity and no construction risk.
Zero Legal Risk: 100% legally cleared, registry executable without visiting India.
Brand Recognition: County Group projects are trusted benchmark in NRI circles.
Rental Income: Premium rentals from C-suite corporate tenants in nearby IT hubs.
Low Density: Only 546 units means uncrowded amenities and real privacy for families.
Green Living: Cascading vertical gardens create a unique, resort-style outdoor experience.
School Proximity: Multiple quality schools within 5 km radius.
Price Barrier: Minimum ticket size of ₹2.64 Cr is out of reach for most first-time buyers.
No Appreciation Play: Capital values have largely plateaued — limited upside for new entrants.

recommendation.primary_thesis: The absolute safest and most beautiful ready-to-move luxury home in Central Noida.
recommendation.end_use_thesis: Best-in-class RTM luxury for families demanding zero operational risk.
recommendation.investment_thesis: Wealth preservation. Steady 5–7% annual appreciation. Not a flipping play.
recommendation.family_thesis: Exceptional — huge parks, clean air, low density, secure society.
recommendation.investor_thesis: Low yield (2.8–3.1%) but rock-solid capital preservation. Hold 5–10 years.
recommendation.luxury_thesis: Defines the luxury benchmark for Sector 75. County Group never compromises on specification.
recommendation.risk_thesis: Lowest-risk luxury asset in Central Noida. Clean title, zero structural disputes.
walk_away_conditions: Budget under ₹2.5 Cr — entry is uncompromising.
Require immediate walking-distance transit — vehicular dependence is inherent.
Executing high-yield or short-term flipping — capital values have plateaued.
recommendation.timeline_advice: Ready to move immediately. No construction risk whatsoever.

competitors.verdict: Ivy County wins on build quality and prestige
competitors.price_delta_note: ₹8L cheaper per Cr vs Mahagun Moderne…

competitors.competitor_advantage: Larger carpet area and sovereign safety
competitors.verdict: NBCC wins on unit size, Ivy wins on immediate possession
competitors.price_delta_note: ₹8L cheaper per Cr vs Mahagun Moderne…
